学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 60 and 73 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with general attention on short video platforms, not forming a significant signal of application heat; the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous fields.
